rationale: El Niño is now confirmed ongoing with explicit threat of weather extremes, directly elevating wildfire and drought risk for Portugal; this is the most relevant event for a Portuguese resident this cycle.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: El Niño officially confirmed active; directly raises wildfire and drought risk for Iberia, threatening Portugal's tourism economy and daily life.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: Persistent economic risk from US-Iran tensions; indirect effect on EU energy prices and Portuguese cost of living.

top_events.title: Gold is now the top reserve asset. Is dollar dominance at risk?
top_events.summary: Ongoing structural shift in global reserve assets; indirect long-term effect on EU financial stability and Portuguese economy.
